authority.department: Labour, Skill Development and Employment Department, Government of Gujarat

overview: State-specific labour law requirements applicable to establishments operating in Gujarat.

rules.title: Review Gujarat Shops and Establishments Registration
rules.description: Determine whether registration under the Gujarat Shops and Establishments legislation is applicable.

rules.title: Maintain Statutory Registers and Employment Records
rules.description: Maintain statutory registers, employment records and notices prescribed under Gujarat labour legislation.

rules.title: Display Statutory Notices
rules.description: Display statutory notices and abstracts required under Gujarat labour legislation.

rules.title: Review Working Hours, Leave and Weekly Holidays
rules.description: Ensure compliance with Gujarat provisions governing working hours, overtime, leave and weekly holidays.

rules.title: Review Professional Tax Registration and Compliance
rules.description: Determine whether Professional Tax registration, deduction, return filing and payment obligations apply in Gujarat.

citations.reference: Gujarat State Tax on Professions, Trades, Callings and Employments legislation

rules.title: Review Labour Welfare Fund Compliance
rules.description: Review employer obligations relating to the Gujarat Labour Welfare Fund, where applicable.

recommended.title: Annual Labour Compliance Audit
recommended.description: Conduct an annual review covering statutory registrations, labour records, wage compliance and inspection readiness.

recommended.title: Digital Compliance Calendar
recommended.description: Maintain a digital calendar for labour law renewals, returns, inspections and statutory due dates.
